prompt: Run /extendaibundle to add a minimal new skill called /licence-audit (one line: audit a repo's dependency licences). Scaffold it with tools/new-capability.py, write a brief real SKILL.md body and Copilot prompt, curate its eval, wire it into both managed-block lists and the prose counts, bump the revision, and run tools/verify-bundle.ps1. NOTE: run this with --workspace pointing at an AI-Forward pack clone (the skill edits pack/).
